languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готов выйти на связь и поговорить о заключенном соглашении".
"Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готов выйти на связь и поговорить о заключенном соглашении".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."
"Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."
"Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

languages.text: 「キャプテン様！アルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17が、貴殿との協定について連絡を取りたいと申しております」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

traits.locale_text: 「キャプテン様！アルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17が、貴殿との協定について連絡を取りたいと申しております。」

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 está listo para hablar de su acuerdo con usted».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 está listo para hablar de su acuerdo con usted».

languages.text: “舰长大人！卡利西斯祭坛17号已准备好建立通讯，与您商谈协定事宜。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！卡利西斯祭坛17号已准备好建立通讯，与您商谈协定事宜。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 ist bereit, Kontakt aufzunehmen und Eure Vereinbarung zu besprechen."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 ist bereit, Kontakt aufzunehmen und Eure Vereinbarung zu besprechen."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, aranızdaki anlaşmayı görüşmek üzere temas kurmaya hazır."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, aranızdaki anlaşmayı görüşmek üzere temas kurmaya hazır."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! La station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 est prête à entrer en communication avec vous pour discuter de votre arrangement. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 is ready to make contact to discuss the agreement between you."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! La station Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 est prête à entrer en communication avec vous pour discuter de votre arrangement. »
